return(function(E,J,H,W,w,P,v,D,F,s,Y,p,V,K,h,i,Z,I,k,e,g,N,z,m)g,p,F,z,Y,k,h,N,K,V,s,Z,D,m,i,I,e=function(E,A)local J=V(A)local H=function(H,W,w,P,v,I,p)return N(E,{H,W;w;P,v;I;p},A,J)end return H end,function(E)for A=655988-655987,#E,237596-237595 do p[E[A]]=(-534427-(-534428))+p[E[A]]end if H then local N=H(true)local W({},{[A(-457320+491237)]=h,[A(105225+-71706)]=E;[A(-828209-(-861831))]=function()return 654491+-4257018 end})end end,function(E,A)local J=V(A)local H=function(...)return N(E,{...},A,J)end return H end,function(E,A)local J=V(A)local H=function(H,W,w)return N(E,{H,W,w},A,J)end return H end,function(E,A)local J=V(A)local H=function(H,W,w,P)return N(E,{H,W;w,P},A,J)end return H end,function(E,A)local J=V(A)local H=function(H,W,w,P,v)return N(E,{H;W,w,P;v},A,J)end return H end,-1033661-(-1033661),{},function(E,A)local J=V(A)local H=function(H,W,w,P,v,I)return N(E,{H;W,w;P;v;I},A,J)end return H end return(s(-906380+16375004,{}))(J(v))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[A(-411040-(-444667))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
